title: Fog Begone
description: Removes all fog from the game for a clearer experience.
body:
Banishes all fog from sight. This includes fog from Blindess, Darkness, Water Submersion, Lava Submersion, and Render Distance!
This can be useful for when you want to mine Ancient Debris in the nether lakes and still see where things are, or when you are going to the deep dark and want to see.

Icon By: PixelPawP
